case_title: BURKETT, KATHLEEN et al VS RODDIE, PATRICK

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODDIE, PATRICK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT RODDIE, PATRICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BURKETT, KATHLEEN REYNOLDS, RICHARD PLAINTIFFS ARE ORDERED TO TRANSFER TO DEFENDANT ANY PROOFS STILL IN THEIR POSSESSION ON CONTRACT. PLAINTIFF SHALL NOT MAKE ANY USE OF, OR MAKE PHOTOGRAPHIC PRINTS FROM DEFENDANT'S PROOFS WITHOUT DEFENDANT'S CONSENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SHERIFF DEPARTMENT FILES DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE RE POS AS TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM; NUMEROUS ATTEMPTS MADE, NO RESPONSE, FROM DEFENDANT.
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-17-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,205.00 FILED BY RODDIE, PATRICK AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BURKETT, KATHLEEN REYNOLDS, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-17-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-19-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 7/19/06 AT 10:00 A.M. FOR DISMISSAL OR TRIAL.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BURKETT, KATHLEEN REYNOLDS, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT RODDIE, PATRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-29-2006, OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURKETT, KATHLEEN REYNOLDS, RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RODDIE, PATRICK DEFENDANT PATRICK RODDIE IS ORDERED TO TRANSFER TO PLAINTIFFS 100 SPECIAL PHOTOGRAPHIS AS PREVIOUSLY AGREED. COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF COMPLIED WITH THIS TURN OVER ORDER IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT RODDIE SHALL MAINTAIN PLAINTIFF'S PHOTOGRAPHS PROOFS ON THE INTERNET FOR FURTHER ACCESS AND TO ORDER ADDITIONAL PRINTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
